    Writes the given ChartOfAccounts object to an Excel workbook at the specified Path.
    static Account
    FileImportService.findAccountIgnoreCase(ChartOfAccounts chart, String name)
    Searches the entire ChartOfAccounts for an account whose name matches the provided value, ignoring case and trimming whitespace.
    static List<AccountingTransaction>
    FileImportService.importOFXorQIFFile(File file, Account targetAccountInCOA, ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts, Ledger ledger)
    Imports transactions from a specified file (OFX or QIF) and maps them to accounting transactions.
    (package private) static List<AccountingTransaction>
    FileImportService.mapToAccountingTransactions(List<ImportedTransaction> importedTxns, Account targetAccount, ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts, Ledger existingLedger)
    Maps a list of ImportedTransaction objects to a list of AccountingTransaction objects.
    void
    ChartOfAccountsService.replaceChart(ChartOfAccounts imported)
    Replaces all accounts in the current chart of accounts with those from an imported ChartOfAccounts object.
    void
    ChartOfAccountsService.setChart(ChartOfAccounts newChart)
    Replaces the underlying ChartOfAccounts instance this service operates on.
